case_title: TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION vs. SCHAMBER, JEFF et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SCHAMBER, JEFF THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 44 MCALLISTER STREET, #219, LEASE FORFEITED, -NOTATION MADE ON ORIGINAL LEASE PER CRC 522.

EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT SCHAMBER, JEFF
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT SCHAMBER, JEFF
